hooks.command: $json = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $json.tool_input.file_path; if ($f -like '*.sh') { $sh = 'C:\Program Files\Git\bin\sh.exe'; $err = (& $sh -n $f 2>&1 | Out-String).Trim(); if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { $ctx = 'SHELL SYNTAX ERROR in ' + $f + ': ' + $err; @{hookSpecificOutput=@{hookEventName='PostToolUse';additionalContext=$ctx}} | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 } else { @{hookSpecificOutput=@{hookEventName='PostToolUse';additionalContext='Syntax OK. Remember to run the functional tests: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\test\run-tests.ps1'}} | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 } }
